com.jsyn.instruments

Class DualOscillatorSynthVoice

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitGenerator
      • com.jsyn.unitgen.Circuit
        • com.jsyn.instruments.DualOscillatorSynthVoice
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    UnitSource, UnitVoice

    public class DualOscillatorSynthVoice
extends Circuit
implements UnitVoice
    Synthesizer voice with two morphing oscillators and a four-pole resonant filter. Modulate the amplitude and filter using DAHDSR envelopes.

    • Field Detail

      • amplitude

        public UnitInputPort amplitude

      • frequency

        public UnitInputPort frequency

      • frequencyScaler

        public UnitInputPort frequencyScaler
        This scales the frequency value. You can use this to modulate a group of instruments using a shared LFO and they will stay in tune. Set to 1.0 for no modulation.

      • oscShape1

        public UnitInputPort oscShape1

      • oscShape2

        public UnitInputPort oscShape2

      • noteOff

        noteOff in interface UnitVoice

      • noteOn

        public void noteOn(double freq,
                   double ampl,
                   TimeStamp timeStamp)
        Description copied from interface: UnitVoice
        Play whatever you consider to be a note on this voice. Do not be constrained by traditional definitions of notes or music.
        Specified by:
        noteOn in interface UnitVoice
        Parameters:
        freq - in Hz related to the perceived pitch of the note.
        ampl - generally between 0.0 and 1.0
        timeStamp - when to play the note

        getOutput in interface UnitSource
